name: New-patient intake → SMS concierge → book consult
description: When a new-patient intake form is submitted, text the patient within 2 minutes to thank them by name, have a short SMS conversation to confirm insurance and pick a time, book them into a new-patient consultation, and email a confirmation with the clinic address.

steps.initial_message: Hi {{first_name}}, it's Bright Smile Dental 🦷 Thanks for reaching out — we're glad you did. No pressure at all, just wanted to ask: when would you ideally like to come in for your free new-patient consultation? Also, quick one: do you have dental insurance (yes / no / not sure)? We'll take care of everything from there.
steps.exit_when: patient has shared a preferred day/time window AND confirmed their insurance status (yes, no, or unsure)

extract.preferred_time: the day/time window the patient said works best for them, in natural language

args.notes: Auto-booked from new-patient intake. Reason: {{reason_for_visit}}. Insurance: {{has_insurance}}.

args.body: You're all set, {{first_name}} — we've got your new-patient consultation booked. Just sent a confirmation to {{email}} with the clinic address and what to expect. Any questions, just text back. — Bright Smile Dental

args.subject: You're booked, {{first_name}} — see you soon at Bright Smile Dental
args.body:
Hi {{first_name}},

Thanks for booking your free new-patient consultation with Bright Smile Dental — we can't wait to meet you. No pressure, no sales pitch, just a friendly chat about your smile and a gentle look-around.

What to expect:
• 45-minute visit with one of our dentists
• Modern, low-pain tech (yes, really)
• Totally free — no insurance needed to come in

Clinic address:
Bright Smile Dental
[Insert clinic street address here]

If anything changes or you need to reschedule, just reply to this email or text us back — we'll sort it out, easy.

See you soon,
The Bright Smile Dental team
